title: Fireball Shower
description: Adds constant raining Fireballs to your game!
body:
![Fireball Shower By Deinowharf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2594a3f2e3c8a014ef27595d9cb63c89dc2704cf.png)

## **Mod Description (simplified)**
This mod makes it rains fireballs from the sky! There's a couple commands that lets you customize the fireball shower. The Fireball shower automatically starts when you start the world. 
 

 
## **Mod Description (advanced)**
This mod spawns fireballs above each player that shoot down at randomized angles from y level 150. The Fireballs will spawn above each player in a 64 block radius.
 

## **Gamerules**
 

/gamerule fireballcraziness is a command that sets the craziness level which controls how many fireballs spawn, ranges from 0 to 64.

/gamerule fireballshowerenabled is a command that enables or disables the fireball rain. (true or false)

 

That is all thank you! If you have any problems or questions leave it in comments. (;
